title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and OpenAI's Codex across five evaluation categories: user interface, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues the Codex versus Claude Code question itself is misguided and advocates focusing on broader development practices rather than tool selection alone.
